courses.title: Certificate III in Business
courses.description: Develop practical business, communication, and administrative skills for entry-level office and workplace roles.

courses.title: Certificate IV in Business
courses.description: Build advanced business, leadership, and organisational skills to prepare for supervisory and administrative positions.

courses.title: Certificate III in Process Manufacturing
courses.description: Gain hands-on skills in production processes, safety procedures, and manufacturing operations for industrial workplaces.

courses.title: Certificate II in Retail Services
courses.description: Learn foundational retail and customer service skills to work confidently in retail and sales environments.

courses.title: Certificate III in Retail
courses.description: Develop customer engagement, sales, merchandising, and retail operations skills for modern retail workplaces.

courses.title: Certificate IV in Retail Management
courses.description: Prepare for leadership roles in retail by developing team management, operational, and customer service skills.

courses.title: Certificate II in Hospitality
courses.description: Learn essential hospitality and customer service skills for entry-level roles in cafes, restaurants, and hotels.

courses.title: Certificate III in Hospitality
courses.description: Develop practical hospitality skills including food service, customer engagement, and daily hospitality operations.

courses.title: Certificate IV in Hospitality
courses.description: Build supervisory and operational hospitality skills to manage teams and deliver quality guest experiences.
